Draft.title: Email Draft
Draft.description: A saved email draft or template generated by the user or MailGenius AI.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the user who owns this draft.

recipientEmail.description: The email address of the recipient.

subject.description: The subject line of the email.

body.description: The body content of the email draft.

tone.description: The selected emotional tone for the email generation.

language.description: The written language of the email.

isStarred.description: Flag to mark a draft as starred/favorite.

createdAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the draft was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the draft was last updated.

users/{userId}/drafts/{draftId}.description: User-specific collection of saved email drafts and custom templates.
